mapper.select:
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, ds.user_id, ds.date_type, ds.start_time, ds.end_time, ds.filter_invalid_channels, ds.filter_http_high_delay, ds.filter_ffmpeg_high_delay, ds.filter_no_video_stream, ds.filter_no_audio_stream, ds.filter_low_resolution, ds.merge_same_channels, ds.created_at, ds.updated_at, du.username as distributionUser_username FROM distribution_subscriptions ds left join distribution_users du on ds.user_id = du.id and du.deleted = 0 WHERE ds.deleted = 0
AND ds.name LIKE '%' || #{query.name} || '%'
AND ds.user_id = #{query.userId}
ORDER BY ds.id DESC

SELECT id, name, user_id, date_type, start_time, end_time, filter_invalid_channels, filter_http_high_delay, filter_ffmpeg_high_delay, filter_no_video_stream, filter_no_audio_stream, filter_low_resolution, merge_same_channels, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, user_id, date_type, start_time, end_time, filter_invalid_channels, filter_http_high_delay, filter_ffmpeg_high_delay, filter_no_video_stream, filter_no_audio_stream, filter_low_resolution, merge_same_channels, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT count(1) FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO distribution_subscriptions ( name, user_id, date_type, start_time, end_time, filter_invalid_channels, filter_http_high_delay, filter_ffmpeg_high_delay, filter_no_video_stream, filter_no_audio_stream, filter_low_resolution, merge_same_channels, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{userId}, #{dateType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{filterInvalidChannels}, #{filterHttpHighDelay}, #{filterFfmpegHighDelay}, #{filterNoVideoStream}, #{filterNoAudioStream}, #{filterLowResolution}, #{mergeSameChannels}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE distribution_subscriptions SET name = #{name}, user_id = #{userId}, date_type = #{dateType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, filter_invalid_channels = #{filterInvalidChannels}, filter_http_high_delay = #{filterHttpHighDelay}, filter_ffmpeg_high_delay = #{filterFfmpegHighDelay}, filter_no_video_stream = #{filterNoVideoStream}, filter_no_audio_stream = #{filterNoAudioStream}, filter_low_resolution = #{filterLowResolution}, merge_same_channels = #{mergeSameChannels}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
